prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度高热/偏热；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（历史类 11.9 万+物理类 26.0 万≈37.9 万）略有增加，竞争略加剧；四川大学位于成都市（西南地区），对广西考生有较强地域吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 3173, 10359, 15819, 14696, and 13697 respectively. In 2022, due to a gap, it significantly dropped to 10359; in 2023, it further dropped to 15819 (the highest in recent years); in 2024-2025, it rebounded, stabilizing in the 13700-14700 range in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 13697. Local Science/Physics Category enrollment plans: 182 in 2021, 182 in 2022, 173 in 2023, 169 in 2024, 171 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 185, an increase of 14 from 2025 (an expansion of about 8.2%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 14-16 in recent years (16th in 2026), making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', with 51 total incidents (1 positive, 46 negative, 4 neutral), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion issues. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. From 2022 to 2023, there were signs of a significant drop in admission scores due to gaps, which has a lagging effect on application psychology. It has A+ in Stomatology, A in Clinical Medicine, A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A+ in Nursing, A in Mathematics, A in Pharmacy, A- in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Law, etc., with a total of 19 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology are highly popular/relatively hot in society. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in this province is about 392,000, a slight increase from 2025 (History Category 119,000 + Physics Category 260,000 ≈ 379,000), slightly intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest China), which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable rebound trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.2% (alleviating competition), the significantly negative reputation of the university (which may suppress some application willingness), and the slight increase in the number of local test takers, based on the 2025 baseline of 13697, with a slight upward adjustment due to negative reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14400, with a range of 13900-14900.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 442 → 513 → 1287 → 546 → 694. In 2023, it significantly dropped to 1287 (highest in recent years), rebounded to 546 in 2024, and slightly dropped to 694 in 2025; the fluctuation range in the past two years is about 546–694, with a baseline of about 694 in 2025. Provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment: 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 14, a decrease of 16 from 2025 (a reduction of about 53.3%), which is a significant reduction and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 14–16 in recent years (16th in 2026), making it a top national comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', with 51 total events (1 positive, 46 negative, 4 neutral), mainly involving teacher ethics and academic misconduct; Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively popular), with moderate short video exposure; there were signs of a significant drop in admission分数线 in 2022–2023, which has a lagging effect on application psychology; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A-, Journalism and Communication A-, Public Administration A-, etc., with outstanding liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors like Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Journalism and Communication is polarized (Law recommended, Chinese Language recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged); the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 392,000, slightly higher than 2025 (history category 119,000 + physics category 260,000 ≈ 379,000), slightly intensifying competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (southwest region), which has strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings in recent years, the significant reduction of about 53.3% in the 2026 plan (significantly intensifying competition), the clearly negative university reputation (which may suppress some application willingness), and a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 694, with a slight upward adjustment due to negative reputation factors; the predicted minimum ranking is about 482, with a range of 424–540.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力雄厚。其华西医学中心是国内顶尖的医学教育机构之一，口腔医学、临床医学等 学科享有极高声誉，对考生有持续强劲的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心医学专业竞争尤为激烈。四川大学医学类在广西招生规模稳定在27-31人之间，属于中等偏小规模，供需关系偏 紧。成都作为西南中心城市，城市吸引力强，进一步推高了报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次回升趋势及医学类专业持续高热度的背景，预计2026年四川大学医学类最低录取位次约为13497名，较2025年小幅上升（位次数字减小，竞争加剧）。波动区间预计 在13092至13902名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate medical enrollment batch of Sichuan University in Guangxi, the minimum ranking in 2021 was 2650 (planned 22 students), which dropped sharply to 10359 in 2022 (expanded to 31 students), continued to decline to 15819 in 2023 (planned 30 students), rebounded to 14696 in 2024 (reduced to 27 students), and further rebounded to 13697 in 2025 (expanded to 29 students). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 29 students, unchanged from 2025, and the plan has no direct significant impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its West China Medical Center is one of the top medical education institutions in China, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine enjoying extremely high reputations, exerting sustained strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being particularly competitive. The enrollment scale of Sichuan University's medical majors in Guangxi is stable at 27-31 students, which is a medium to small scale, and the supply-demand relationship is relatively tight. As a central city in the southwest, Chengdu has strong urban appeal, further boosting the popularity of applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend of historical rankings and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical majors in 2026 will be approximately 13497, slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies). The fluctuation range is expected to be between 13092 and 13902.
